segments.text: He's pushing DK with down smash - knockback away!
segments.original_text: ドミノグを押している 下スマッシュ引くベクトルだ

segments.text: Rough spot - way back on stage... and he recovers!
segments.original_text: かなり苦しいぞ ステージ後方 戻ってきた

segments.text: DK's back in with the aerial, throw - and it chains perfectly!
segments.original_text: ドミノグ反転は空中攻撃に挑戦できて 投げたしかもこれはつながるパーフェクト

full_text: He's pushing DK with down smash - knockback away! Rough spot - way back on stage... and he recovers! DK's back in with the aerial, throw - and it chains perfectly! Down special to finish it!
